markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Paris vs Poullain professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Cherbourg Round Of 32 after a ball has been played. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
